name: Radiant Quantum-Crystalline Forge
description: A majestic, zero-gravity forge where infinite quantum crystals self-assemble into intricate fractal geometries, pulsating with radiant chromatic energy and refracting light in a dazzling abyssal void.

params.name: Crystallization Density
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Chromatic Aberration
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Fog Intensity
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Mouse Influence
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
